name: crashpoint-ios-mcp
description: MCP server for iOS/macOS crash log export, symbolication, analysis, Zoho Cliq reporting & Zoho Projects bug creation.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/core-server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/core-server.js && esbuild src/integrations-server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/integrations-server.js && esbuild src/cli/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/cli.js

author: maanasa-s-5539
